caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned against a solid black background, appearing to speak and gesture with her hands. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring red and blue floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark necklace. In the early frames, she speaks with her mouth open and her hands raised and open to her sides. As the sequence progresses, she continues speaking, and her hands move closer to her chest, with her right hand resting near her left collarbone in the final frame. A small logo featuring a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left or bottom center of each scene. The lighting is consistent across all frames, focusing entirely on the woman as she delivers her presentation.
